title: More than 45 killed, around 70 injured in blast at explosives storage building in Myanmar

The blast occurred Sunday in Kaungtup village, near the Chinese border, an area controlled by the TNLA. Rescue efforts are ongoing, with 46 bodies recovered and 74 injured taken to the hospital.

As ACs run nonstop in 45°C heat, are Delhi homes facing a growing fire hazard?
description: Delhi-NCR's sweltering heat is pushing ACs to their limits, sparking a rise in dangerous fires. Faulty wiring, overloaded circuits, and poor maintenance are increasingly causing AC-related blazes, with recent fatal incidents highlighting the urgent need for awareness. Experts warn that ignoring early warning signs like burning smells or flickering lights can have devastating consequences.

Declan Rice upset over attacks on girlfriend Lauren Fryer before World Cup
description: Arsenal star midfielder Declan Rice has been eyeing the 2026 World Cup but his relationship with his girlfriend, Lauren Fryer, has continued to dominate the headlines, even as their relationship gets brutally mocked. While Declan Rice has often praised his girlfriend and the mother of his child, Lauren Fryer, for her support, he has often been mocked for her appearance. Amid this, Declan Rice’s comments about how he feels about it have sparked chaos.

title: NFL Trade Rumor: Packers, Lions emerge for Colts’ $33m QB landing spot
description: The Indianapolis Colts’ star player Anthony Richardson is actively seeking a trade since the last few weeks even as he continues to attend the team’s OTAs, sparking confusion among all the fans. While a number of teams have been linked to him, it seems the Green Bay Packers and the Detroit Lions have emerged as strong landing spots for the star player.

title: Hundreds of faculty members of University of California sign open letter
description: University of California faculty are urging the reinstatement of SAT/ACT math requirements for STEM applicants, citing a significant decline in student math skills since the tests were dropped. They argue current admissions practices fail to ensure readiness, forcing instructors to reteach basic math and jeopardizing the quality of STEM education.

title: 'Amazon would collapse if run like New York City': Jeff Bezos takes swipe at Mamdani
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has endorsed New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's new government efficiency initiative, COGE. This comes after their public disagreement on taxing the wealthy. Bezos, who previously criticized city spending, now supports Mamdani's plan to make government work smarter, suggesting savings could benefit lower earners.

title: Blake Lively reportedly hits breaking point amid Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce fallout
description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have remained distant and private about their feelings for the Hollywood power couple, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds, as they gear up to get married in the next few weeks in New York City. As speculations swirl about whether Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds will be attending Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s high profile wedding, it seems the actress has reached a breaking point in her life.
